At least 1 image showing the stain on the laptop surface
At least 1 image showing liquid damage indicators

At least 1 image showing the crushed area
At least 1 image showing water damage to packaging
At least 1 image showing the stain on the package
At least 1 image showing the empty package interior
At least 1 image showing the broken item
